description_long: This helmet features a striking, angular design with a deep teal, almost metallic finish. The front is sharply contoured, with a pronounced central ridge and two elongated, upward-pointing side fins that give it a futuristic, almost fantasy-inspired appearance. The eye openings are large and angular, providing a wide field of vision, while the lower face area is open and jagged, suggesting a focus on style over full facial protection. The surface has a mottled, slightly reflective texture, with a bright highlight at the crown. The sides of the helmet flare outward dramatically, enhancing its aggressive silhouette. There are no visible logos, graphics, or ventilation openings, and the interior appears hollow, likely designed to fit over a human head.
description: A teal, angular helmet with dramatic side fins, large eye openings, and a mottled, semi-reflective surface. The design is futuristic and aggressive, with no visible graphics or vents.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sharp central ridge, large eye openings, and the upward-pointing side fins.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the dramatic outward flare of the side fin and the open lower face area.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the helmet's broad, curved back and the symmetrical placement of the side fins.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the angular cheek and jawline cutouts.
